identity.name: ArtsPoetica Global
identity.tagline: Saving the world one poem at a time

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and featured poem excerpts.

body.usage: Navigation, long-form text, UI elements, buttons.

textures.grain: url('data:image/svg+xml,...') (Use a noise overlay for depth)
textures.paper: Subtle paper texture for poetry sections

layout_system.grid_gallery: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-8 (Tetris Mode)

Navigation.style: Fixed, glassmorphism (blur-md), minimal links, large logo.
Navigation.interactions: Links underline reveal on hover. Mobile menu full screen overlay.

HeroSection.style: Full height (h-screen), video background or parallax image, centered typography.
HeroSection.elements: H1 (Cormorant), Subheading (DM Sans), Primary CTA (Gold Pill Button).

ArtistCard.style: Vertical portrait aspect ratio, image zoom on hover, text overlay at bottom with gradient.

PoemCard.style: Paper background (#F3E5D0), serif font, elegant padding, looks like a book page.

EventCalendar.style: Minimalist list view (Date | Event Name | Location | CTA). Hover reveals image preview.

ShopItem.style: Clean minimal card, square image, price and title below. Quick add to cart button on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT use the existing 'clouds' animation from the old CSS. It is too cartoonish. Use the 'Ethereal Motion' concept with CSS keyframes for slow fades and blurs.
Implement a 'Hybrid Theme': The Book Publishing section should feel lighter (Bone White background), while the Music section should be dark (Obsidian background).
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for ALL Headings (h1-h6). Use 'DM Sans' for body text. Import these from Google Fonts.
Navigation: Create a 'Mega Menu' that elegantly splits into 'Publishing' and 'Music' divisions.
Artist Profiles: These are the core. They must look like magazine features, not database entries. Use large hero images.
Shop: Keep it clean and gallery-like. Minimal distraction.
AI Chat: Style it as a 'Concierge'. Use the Gold accent color for the chat bubble trigger.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections. Do not assume other images.
Respect the 'Spacing Philosophy': Use p-12 or p-24 for section padding. Don't cram content.
Ensure the 'Bento Grid' is used for the Artists Directory.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
